channel.title: Lee Ainslie — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Lee Ainslie (Maverick Capital) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Lee Ainslie: ADDED META (+50%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Lee Ainslie (Maverick Capital) added META in Q4 2025 · 2.9% of portfolio. Big META add — conviction build.

item.title: Lee Ainslie: ADDED NFLX (+35%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Lee Ainslie (Maverick Capital) added NFLX in Q4 2025 · 3.4% of portfolio. Adding Netflix.

item.title: Lee Ainslie: TRIMMED PDD (-26%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Lee Ainslie (Maverick Capital) trimmed PDD (PG&amp;E CORP) in Q4 2025 · 7.8% of portfolio.

item.title: Lee Ainslie: TRIMMED AMZN (-23%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Lee Ainslie (Maverick Capital) trimmed AMZN (AMAZON COM INC) in Q4 2025 · 6.9% of portfolio.

item.title: Lee Ainslie: TRIMMED MSFT (-16%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Lee Ainslie (Maverick Capital) trimmed MSFT (MICROSOFT CORP) in Q4 2025 · 6.1% of portfolio.

item.title: Lee Ainslie: ADDED CRH (+20%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Lee Ainslie (Maverick Capital) added CRH (CRH PLC) in Q4 2025 · 4.5% of portfolio.

item.title: Lee Ainslie: ADDED BN (+33%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Lee Ainslie (Maverick Capital) added BN (BROOKFIELD CORP) in Q4 2025 · 3.9% of portfolio.

item.title: Lee Ainslie: TRIMMED COF (-21%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Lee Ainslie (Maverick Capital) trimmed COF (CAPITAL ONE FINL CORP) in Q4 2025 · 3.7% of portfolio.

item.title: Lee Ainslie: NEW POSITION CMG (+100%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Lee Ainslie (Maverick Capital) new position CMG (CHIPOTLE MEXICAN GRILL INC) in Q4 2025 · 2.4% of portfolio.

item.title: Lee Ainslie: ADDED DHR (+1100%) · Q4 2025
